headline: Jefferies Raises ADM Price Target to $77, Sees Q1 as Earnings Low Point
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) is included among the 15 Best Consistent Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 6, Jefferies raised its price recommendation on Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) to $77 from $65. It reiterated a Hold rating on the shares. The firm sees Q1 as the low point.
